plugin.name: Search_and_Destroy
plugin.author: Rodarvus
plugin.purpose: Campaign, GQ, quest mob targeting and hunting
plugin.description: Search and Destroy v2 - Campaign/GQ/Quest mob management. Based on Crowley's and WinkleGold's Search and Destroy plugins.

trigger.name: trg_cp_info_start
trigger.match: ^The targets for this campaign are:$

trigger.name: trg_cp_info_end
trigger.match: ^(?!Find and kill 1 \* .+ \(.+\))

trigger.name: trg_cp_check_line
trigger.match: ^You still have to kill \* (.+) \((.+?)(?: - (Dead))?\)$

trigger.name: trg_cp_check_end
trigger.match: ^(?!You still have to kill \* .+ \(.+?(?: - Dead)?\))

trigger.name: trg_cp_check_dead_note
trigger.match: ^Note: Dead means that the target is dead, not that you have killed it\.$

trigger.name: trg_cp_request
trigger.match: ^\w.+ tells you 'Good luck in your campaign!'$

trigger.name: trg_cp_mob_killed
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of your CAMPAIGN mobs!$

trigger.name: trg_cp_complete
trigger.match: ^CONGRATULATIONS! You have completed your campaign\.$

trigger.name: trg_cp_cleared
trigger.match: ^Campaign cleared\.$

trigger.name: trg_cp_new_available
trigger.match: ^(?:(?:## )?You may now take another campaign\.|You may take (?:a campaign at this level|another campaign)\.)$

trigger.name: trg_cp_not_on
trigger.match: ^You are not currently on a campaign\.$

trigger.name: trg_cp_must_level
trigger.match: ^You must level to get a new campaign\.$

trigger.name: trg_cp_timer
trigger.match: ^You cannot take another campaign for (?:(?:\d+ hours?, )?\d+ minutes? and )?\d+ seconds?\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_info_extended
trigger.match: ^Quest Status\.\.\.\.\.\.\.: \[ Extended \]$

trigger.name: trg_gq_check_line
trigger.match: ^You still have to kill ([1-3]) \* (.+) \((\S.+?)(?: - Dead)?\)$

trigger.name: trg_gq_check_end
trigger.match: ^(?!You still have to kill [1-3] \* .+ \(\S.+?(?: - Dead)?\))

trigger.name: trg_gq_mob_killed
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of the GLOBAL QUEST mobs!$

trigger.name: trg_gq_joined
trigger.match: ^You have now joined Global Quest # (\d+)\.

trigger.name: trg_gq_started
trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+) for levels (\d{1,3}) to (\d{1,3})(?: - .+)? has now started\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_finished
trigger.match: ^You have finished this global quest\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_ended
trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+)(?: \(extended\))? is now over\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_not_started
trigger.match: ^Global Quest # (\d{1,5}) has not yet started\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_won
trigger.match: ^You were the first to complete this quest!$

trigger.name: trg_gq_cancelled
trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+) has been cancelled due to lack of activity\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_quit
trigger.match: ^You are no longer part of Global Quest # (\d+) and will be unable to rejoin\.$

trigger.name: trg_gq_not_in
trigger.match: ^You are not in a global quest\.$

trigger.name: trg_ht_direction
trigger.match: ^(?:You are (?:almost )?certain that \w.+ is (north|south|east|west|up|down) from here\.|You are confident that \w.+ passed through here, heading (north|south|east|west|up|down)\.|The trail of \w.+ is confusing, but you're reasonably sure \w.+ headed (north|south|east|west|up|down)\.|There are traces of \w.+ having been here\. Perhaps they lead (north|south|east|west|up|down)\?|You have no idea what you're doing, but maybe \w.+ is (north|south|east|west|up|down)\?|You couldn't find a path to \w.+ from here\.)$

trigger.name: trg_ht_portal
trigger.match: ^(?:You are (?:almost )?certain that \w.+ is through .+\.|You are confident that \w.+ passed through here, heading through .+\.|The trail of \w.+ is confusing, but you're reasonably sure \w.+ headed through .+\.|There are traces of \w.+ having been here\. Perhaps they lead through \w.+\?|You have no idea which way \w.+ went\.)$

trigger.name: trg_ht_here
trigger.match: ^\w.+ is here!$

trigger.name: trg_ht_unable
trigger.match: ^You seem unable to hunt that target for some reason\.$

trigger.name: trg_ht_not_found
trigger.match: ^No one in this area by the name '\w.+'\.$

trigger.name: trg_ht_fighting
trigger.match: ^(?:Not while you are fighting!|You can't hunt while (?:resting|sitting)\.|You dream about going on a nice hunting trip.*)$

trigger.name: trg_ah_direction
trigger.match: ^(?:You are (?:almost )?certain that \w.+ is (north|south|east|west|up|down) from here\.|You are confident that \w.+ passed through here, heading (north|south|east|west|up|down)\.|The trail of \w.+ is confusing, but you're reasonably sure \w.+ headed (north|south|east|west|up|down)\.|There are traces of \w.+ having been here\. Perhaps they lead (north|south|east|west|up|down)\?|You have no idea what you're doing, but maybe \w.+ is (north|south|east|west|up|down)\?)$

trigger.name: trg_ah_here
trigger.match: ^\w.+ is here!$

trigger.name: trg_ah_not_found
trigger.match: ^No one in this area by the name|^You seem unable to hunt

trigger.name: trg_qw_no_match
trigger.match: ^There is no \w.+ around here\.$

trigger.name: trg_kill_detect_xp
trigger.match: ^You receive (\d+) experience points?\.$

trigger.name: trg_noexp_level
trigger.match: ^You raise a level! You are now level (\d+)\.$

trigger.name: trg_noexp_powerup
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, .+\. You have increased your powerups to (\d+)\.$

muclient.script:
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Search & Destroy v2 - Core Plugin -- Combines best features of Crowley's S&D and WinkleGold's S&D ------------------------------------------------------------------------
json = require "json"
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- CONST: Immutable constants ------------------------------------------------------------------------ CONST = { -- Plugin IDs GMCP_HANDLER = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", GMCP_MAPPER = "b6eae87ccedd84f510b74714", Z_ORDER = "462b665ecb569efbf261422f",
-- Broadcast message numbers (Core -> GUI) BCAST_FULL_STATE = 100, BCAST_TARGET_LIST = 101, BCAST_TARGET_CHANGED = 102, BCAST_TARGET_CLEARED = 103, BCAST_QUEST = 104, BCAST_ACTIVITY = 105, BCAST_NOEXP = 106, BCAST_GOTO_LIST = 107,
-- Direction map DIR_MAP = { north = "n", south = "s", east = "e", west = "w", up = "u", down = "d" },
-- Schema version for DB migrations SCHEMA_VERSION = 1,
-- Note colors COLORS = { INFO = "#FF5000", INFO_HIGHLIGHT = "#00B4E0", IMPORTANT = "#FFFFFF", IMPORTANT_HL = "#00FF00", IMPORTANT_BG = "#000080", ERROR = "#FFFFFF", ERROR_HL = "#FFE32E", ERROR_BG = "#650101", DEBUG = "#87CEFA", DEBUG_HL = "#FFD700", },
-- Mob name words to omit during keyword guessing OMIT_WORDS = { ["a"] = true, ["an"] = true, ["and"] = true, ["of"] = true, ["or"] = true, ["some"] = true, ["the"] = true, },
-- Area-specific keyword filters (pattern -> replacement) AREA_KEYWORD_FILTERS = { ["adaldar"] = {{f = "^.*(el)vish (%a*%s?%a+)$", g = "%1 %2"}}, ["bonds"] = {{f = "^(.*[bgry]%a+) dragon$", g = "%1"}}, ["citadel"] = {{f = "^([bgjlmsv]%a+) ([ap]r%a+[el]) .+$", g = "%1 %2"}}, ["elemental"] = { {f = "^(%a+)%'(%a+) (%a+)$", g = "%1%2 %3"}, {f = "^wandering (%a+)%'(%a+) (%a+)$", g = "%1%2 %3"}, }, ["hatchling"] = { {f = "^(%a+) dragon (egg)$", g = "%1 %2"}, {f = "^(%a+) dragon (hatchling)$", g = "%1 %2"}, {f = "^(%a+ %a+) dragon whelp$", g = "%1"}, {f = "^(%a+) dragon (whelp)$", g = "%1 %2"}, }, ["sirens"] = {{f = "^miss ([%a']+)%s?(%a*).*%a$", g = "%1 %2"}}, ["sohtwo"] = { {f = "^(evil) %a+", g = "%1"}, {f = "^(good) %a+", g = "%1"}, }, ["verume"] = {{f = "^lizardman (temple %a+)$", g = "%1"}}, ["wooble"] = { {f = "^sea (%a+)$", g = "%1"}, {f = "^sea (%a+ %a+)$", g = "%1"}, }, },
-- Hardcoded mob keyword exceptions (area -> mob -> keyword) MOB_KEYWORD_EXCEPTIONS = { ["aardington"] = {["a very large portrait"] = "large port"}, ["alehouse"] = { ["a dancing male patron"] = "dancing male", ["a dancing female patron"] = "dancing female", }, ["anthrox"] = { ["the little white rabbit"] = "rabb", ["the bee"] = "worker bee", ["an escaped creature"] = "prisoner creature", ['a "business" man'] = "business man", }, ["ddoom"] = { ["a dangerous scorpion"] = "scorp", ["Lwji, the Sunrise great warrior"] = "lwji", ["Taji, the Sunset leader"] = "taji lead", ["Taji's personal advisor"] = "pers advi", ["Tjac, the Sunrise leader"] = "tjac lead", ["Tjac's personal advisor"] = "sunr advis", ["Yki, the great Sunset warrior"] = "yki", }, ["deneria"] = {["High Priest of Miad'Bir"] = "high miad"}, ["desert"] = {["a village citizen"] = "citi"}, ["fields"] = {["a mutated goat"] = "goat"}, ["fortress"] = { ["a grizzled goblin dressed in skins"] = "grizz gobl", ["Blood Silk, Collector of souls, Queen of the spiders"] = "silk queen", }, ["hell"] = { ["a scrumptious chicken pot pie"] = "chicken pot pie", ["a yummy vegetable pot pie"] = "vegetable pot pie", ["a yummy beef pot pie"] = "beef pot pie", }, ["illoria"] = {["the King and Queen's Guard"] = "pers guard"}, ["landofoz"] = {["one of Dorothy's uncles"] = "doroth uncle"}, ["laym"] = {["an elite guard of the church"] = "elit guar"}, ["livingmine"] = { ["a member of the 'Cal tribe"] = "memb cal", ["a member of the 'Sorr tribe"] = "memb sorr", ["a member of the 'Tai tribe"] = "memb tai", ["Dak'tai's shaman"] = "dakt shama", ["the 'Tai chieftain"] = "tai chief", }, ["longnight"] = {["Mr. Roberge"] = "car rober"}, ["losttime"] = { ["T-Rex"] = "T-rex", ["Great White Shark"] = "white shark", }, ["manor"] = { ["Aremata-Popua"] = "aremata-pop", ["Aremata-Rorua"] = "aremata-ror", }, ["masq"] = { ["a gentleman on the way to the ball"] = "gentl", ["a very attractive woman"] = "attr woman", }, ["necro"] = {["the head necromancer's assistant"] = "old mage assist"}, ["northstar"] = { ["a Blood Ring elite warrior"] = "elit warr", ["Daryoon, a priest of nature"] = "dary pries", ["Tristam, the ------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Util: Stateless utility functions ------------------------------------------------------------------------ local lua_error = error -- save built-in error() before Util.error overwrites it Util = {}
--- Retrieve GMCP data via the handler plugin -- @param path GMCP data path (e.g., "char.status", "room.info") -- @return Lua table/value from GMCP, or nil on failure -- Side effects: calls CallPlugin to GMCP handler -- Tested by: (untested â depends on plugin infrastructure) function Util.gmcp(path) local ret, datastring = CallPlugin(CONST.GMCP_HANDLER, "gmcpdata_as_string", path) if ret ~= 0 or not datastring or datastring == "" then return nil end local fn = loadstring("return " .. datastring) if fn then return fn() end return nil end
--- Send a GMCP packet via the handler plugin -- @param data GMCP packet string -- Tested by: (untested â depends on plugin infrastructure) function Util.send_gmcp(data) CallPlugin(CONST.GMCP_HANDLER, "Send_GMCP_Packet", data) end
--- Query the mapper database via mapper plugin -- @param sql SQL query string -- @return ret (0=success), result (string) -- Tested by: (untested â depends on plugin infrastructure) function Util.map_query(sql) return CallPlugin(CONST.GMCP_MAPPER, "map_find_query", sql) end
--- Escape a string for SQL: wraps in single quotes, doubles internal quotes -- @param s value to escape (string, number, or nil) -- @return SQL-safe string: "'value'" or "NULL" for nil -- Tested by: Util.fixsql, DB.fixsql_integration, DB.fixsql_prevents_injection function Util.fixsql(s) if s then return "'" .. (string.gsub(tostring(s), "'", "''")) .. "'" else return "NULL" end end
--- Trim leading and trailing whitespace -- @param s string (or nil) -- @return trimmed string, "" for nil -- Tested by: Util.trim function Util.trim(s) if not s then return "" end return s:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
--- Split string by delimiter pattern (returns table of tokens) -- @param str string to split -- @param pattern Lua pattern (default: whitespace split) -- @return table of matched tokens -- Tested by: Util.split function Util.split(str, pattern) local result = {} for token in string.gmatch(str, pattern or "[^%s]+") do result[#result + 1] = token end return result end
--- Strip Aardwolf @-color codes from a string -- @param s colored string (or nil) -- @return plain text without color codes, "" for nil -- Tested by: Util.strip_colours function Util.strip_colours(s) if not s then return "" end s = s:gsub("@@", "\0") s = s:gsub("@%-", "~") s = s:gsub("@x%d?%d?%d?", "") s = s:gsub("@.([^@]*)", "%1") return (s:gsub("%z", "@")) end
--- Truncate string to max length, appending "..." if truncated -- @param s string (or nil) -- @param maxlen max length (default 20) -- @return truncated string with "..." or original if fits, "" for nil -- Tested by: Util.ellipsify function Util.ellipsify(s, maxlen) if not s then return "" end maxlen = maxlen or 20 if #s <= maxlen then return s end return s:sub(1, maxlen - 3) .. "..." end
--- Print an info note (alternating colors) function Util.info(...) Util._note({...}, CONST.COLORS.INFO, CONST.COLORS.INFO_HIGHLIGHT) end
--- Print an error note function Util.error(...) Util._note({...}, CONST.COLORS.ERROR, CONST.COLORS.ERROR_HL, CONST.COLORS.ERROR_BG) end
--- Print an important note function Util.important(...) Util._note({...}, CONST.COLORS.IMPORTANT, CONST.COLORS.IMPORTANT_HL, CONST.COLORS.IMPORTANT_BG) end
--- Print a debug note (only when debug mode is on) function Util.debug(...) if Config.get("debug_mode") == "on" then ColourTell(CONST.COLORS.DEBUG_HL, "", "DEBUG: ") Util._note({...}, CONST.COLORS.DEBUG, CONST.COLORS.DEBUG_HL) end end
--- Internal: print a note with alternating colors function Util._note(messages, color1, color2, bg) bg = bg or "" local c1, c2 = color1, color2 for _, msg in ipairs(messages) do ColourTell(c1, bg, tostring(msg)) c1, c2 = c2, c1 end Note("") end
--- Banker's rounding (round half to even) -- @param x number -- @return integer, with ties rounding to even (1.5â2, 2.5â2) -- Tested by: Util.round function Util.round(x) if x == 0 then return 0 end if (x + 0.5) % 2 == 0 then return math.floor(x + 0.5) else return math.ceil(x - 0.5) end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Config: User settings load/save ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Config = { _settings = {}, _dirty = false, }
-- Default setting values Config._defaults = { -- Action modes xcp_action_mode = "qw", -- qw or ht nx_action = "smartscan", -- smartscan, qs, or qw quick_kill_command = "k", -- Auto-features noexp_auto = "on", noexp_tnl_cutoff = "0", autocon = "off", -- Display silent_mode = "off", debug_mode = "off", table_notes = "on", table_width = "80", -- Sound (future) sound = "off", -- GQ gq_extra_aliases = "on", }
--- Load settings from MUSHclient variables, falling back to _defaults -- Side effects: populates Config._settings from GetVariable("snd_<key>") -- Tested by: Config.load, Config.load_with_stored, Config.roundtrip function Config.load() for key, default in pairs(Config._defaults) do local val = GetVariable("snd_" .. key) Config._settings[key] = val or default end end
--- Save dirty settings to MUSHclient variables (no-op if not dirty) -- Side effects: SetVariable("snd_<key>", val) for each setting, clears _dirty -- Tested by: Config.save, Config.save_not_dirty, Config.roundtrip function Config.save() if not Config._dirty then return end for key, val in pairs(Config._settings) do SetVariable("snd_" .. key, val) end Config._dirty = false end
--- Get a config value, falling back to default -- @param key setting name -- @return string value or nil if unknown key -- Tested by: Config.load, Config.get_default_fallback function Config.get(key) return Config._settings[key] or Config._defaults[key] end
--- Set a config value (rejects unknown keys) -- @param key setting name (must exist in _defaults) -- @param value new value string -- @return true if set, false if unknown key -- Side effects: sets _dirty flag -- Tested by: Config.set, Config.set_invalid, cmd_xset.set_config_value function Config.set(key, value) if Config._defaults[key] == nil then Util.error("Unknown setting: ", key) return false end Config._settings[key] = value Config._dirty = true Util.debug("Config set ", key, " = ", value) return true end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- DB: SQLite database operations ------------------------------------------------------------------------ DB = { _db = nil, -- handle for Search_and_Destroy.db _path = nil, }
--- Get the database file path (plugin directory + "Search_and_Destroy.db") -- @return absolute file path string -- Tested by: DB.get_path function DB.get_path() if not DB._path then DB._path = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "Search_and_Destroy.db" end return DB._path end
--- Open the database (cached â returns existing handle if already open) -- @return sqlite3 database handle or nil on failure -- Side effects: logs error via Util.error if open fails function DB.open() if DB._db then return DB._db end DB._db = sqlite3.open(DB.get_path()) if not DB._db then Util.error("Failed to open database: ", DB.get_path()) end return DB._db end
--- Close the database handle -- Side effects: closes sqlite3 connection, sets DB._db = nil function DB.close() if DB._db then DB._db:close() DB._db = nil end end
--- Execute multiple SQL statements in a transaction (rollback on error) -- @param statements table of SQL strings -- @return true on success, or false + error message on failure -- Side effects: DB writes, rollback on error -- Tested by: DB.execute_transaction_success, DB.execute_transaction_rollback function DB.execute_transaction(statements) local db = DB.open() db:execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION;") for _, sql in ipairs(statements) do local rc = db:execute(sql) if rc ~= 0 then local err = db:errmsg() db:execute("ROLLBACK;") Util.error("DB error: ", err) return false, err end end db:execute("COMMIT;") return true end
--- Execute a SELECT query, return result rows as table -- @param sql SQL query string -- @return table of row tables (empty table if no results, never nil) -- Tested by: DB.query_empty_result, DB.schema_created, and many others function DB.query(sql) local db = DB.open() local results = {} for row in db:nrows(sql) do results[#results + 1] = row end return results end
--- Execute a single SQL statement (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, no results) -- @param sql SQL statement -- @return true on success, false on error (logged via Util.debug) function DB.execute(sql) local db = DB.open() local rc = db:execute(sql) if rc ~= 0 then Util.debug("DB.execute error: ", db:errmsg(), " SQL: ", sql) end return rc == 0 end
--- Get current schema version function DB.get_version() local db = DB.open() for row in db:nrows("PRAGMA user_version") do return row.user_version end return 0 end
--- Set schema version function DB.set_version(v) DB.execute(string.format("PRAGMA user_version = %d;", v)) end
--- Initialize database: create schema + seed data on first run, migrate on version change -- Side effects: creates tables, seeds start_rooms + mob_overrides, sets PRAGMA user_version -- Tested by: DB.schema_created, DB.schema_version, DB.init_idempotent, DB.start_rooms_seeded function DB.init() local db = DB.open() local version = DB.get_version()
if version < 1 then Util.info("Creating Search & Destroy database...") DB.create_schema() DB.seed_start_rooms() DB.seed_mob_overrides() DB.set_version(CONST.SCHEMA_VERSION) Util.info("Database ready.") elseif version < CONST.SCHEMA_VERSION then Util.info("Migrating database from v", tostring(version), " to v", tostring(CONST.SCHEMA_VERSION), "...") DB.migrate(version) DB.set_version(CONST.SCHEMA_VERSION) Util.info("Migration complete.") end end
function DB.create_schema() DB.execute([[ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mobs ( mob TEXT NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE, room TEXT COLLATE NOCASE, roomid INTEGER NOT NULL, zone TEXT NOT NULL, freq INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, seen_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, kill_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, updated_at INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (mob, roomid) ); ]]) DB.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mobs_zone ON mobs(zone);") DB.execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mobs_roomid ON mobs(roomid);")
DB.execute([[ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS areas ( key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, minlvl INTEGER DEFAULT 0, maxlvl INTEGER DEFAULT 300, lock_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0, start_room INTEGER, noquest INTEGER DEFAULT 0, vidblain INTEGER DEFAULT 0, user_key TEXT ); ]])
DB.execute([[ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mob_overrides ( mob_name TEXT NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE, area_id TEXT NOT NULL, keyword TEXT, no_hunt INTEGER DEFAULT 0, no_where INTEGER DEFAULT 0, no_scan INTEGER DEFAULT 0, goto_room INTEGER, comment TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (mob_name, area_id) ); ]])
DB.execute([[ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS start_rooms ( area_key TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, area_longname TEXT, roomid INTEGER NOT NULL, user_set INTEGER DEFAULT 0 ); ]]) end
--- Seed start_rooms table from CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS function DB.seed_start_rooms() local stmts = {} for key, data in pairs(CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS) do stmts[#stmts + 1] = string.format( "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO start_rooms (area_key, roomid, user_set) VALUES (%s, %d, 0);", Util.fixsql(key), data.roomid ) end -- Batch in chunks of 50 local batch = {} for i, sql in ipairs(stmts) do batch[#batch + 1] = sql if #batch >= 50 then DB.execute_transaction(batch) batch = {} end end if #batch > 0 then DB.execute_transaction(batch) end end
--- Seed mob_overrides from CONST.MOB_KEYWORD_EXCEPTIONS function DB.seed_mob_overrides() local stmts = {} for area, mobs in pairs(CONST.MOB_KEYWORD_EXCEPTIONS) do for mob_name, keyword in pairs(mobs) do stmts[#stmts + 1] = string.format( "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO mob_overrides (mob_name, area_id, keyword) VALUES (%s, %s, %s);", Util.fixsql(mob_name), Util.fixsql(area), Util.fixsql(keyword) ) end end local batch = {} for i, sql in ipairs(stmts) do batch[#batch + 1] = sql if #batch >= 50 then DB.execute_transaction(batch) batch = {} end end if #batch > 0 then DB.execute_transaction(batch) end end
function DB.migrate(from_version) -- Future migrations go here -- if from_version < 2 then ... end end
--- Look up mob locations from S&D database, ordered by frequency -- @param mob_name mob name to search -- @param zone area key filter (empty string = all zones) -- @return table of rows {mob, room, roomid, zone, freq, kill_count}, empty if not found -- Tested by: DB.find_mob, TargetList.build_area_mob_db_lookup function DB.find_mob(mob_name, zone) local where = string.format("mob = %s", Util.fixsql(mob_name)) if zone and zone ~= "" then where = where .. string.format(" AND zone = %s", Util.fixsql(zone)) end return DB.query("SELECT * FROM mobs WHERE " .. where .. " ORDER BY freq DESC, kill_count DESC;") end
--- Look up start room for an area (DB first, then CONST fallback) -- @param area_key area short key (e.g., "diatz") -- @return roomid (number) or nil if area unknown -- Tested by: DB.get_start_room_default, DB.set_start_room, Nav.goto_area_basic function DB.get_start_room(area_key) local rows = DB.query(string.format( "SELECT roomid FROM start_rooms WHERE area_key = %s LIMIT 1;", Util.fixsql(area_key) )) if #rows > 0 then return rows[1].roomid end -- Fallback to CONST local default = CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS[area_key] if default then return default.roomid end return nil end
--- Set start room for an area (user override) function DB.set_start_room(area_key, roomid, area_longname) DB.execute(string.format( "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO start_rooms (area_key, area_longname, roomid, user_set) VALUES (%s, %s, %d, 1);", Util.fixsql(area_key), Util.fixsql(area_longname), roomid )) end
--- Look up mob override (custom keyword, nohunt/nowhere/noscan flags) -- @param mob_name mob name (case-insensitive via COLLATE NOCASE) -- @param area_id area short key -- @return row table {keyword, no_hunt, no_where, no_scan, ...} or nil -- Tested by: DB.get_mob_override, DB.get_mob_override_miss function DB.get_mob_override(mob_name, area_id) local rows = DB.query(string.format( "SELECT * FROM mob_overrides WHERE mob_name = %s AND area_id = %s LIMIT 1;", Util.fixsql(mob_name), Util.fixsql(area_id) )) return rows[1] -- nil if not found end
--- Record or update a mob sighting (INSERT or increment freq on conflict) -- @param mob_name mob display name -- @param room_name room display name -- @param roomid numeric room ID -- @param zone area short key -- Side effects: DB write, increments freq+seen_count on re-record -- Tested by: DB.record_mob_and_find function DB.record_mob(mob_name, room_name, roomid, zone) DB.execute(string.format( "INSERT INTO mobs (mob, room, roomid, zone, freq, seen_count, updated_at) VALUES (%s, %s, %d, %s, 1, 1, %d) " .. "ON CONFLICT(mob, roomid) DO UPDATE SET freq = freq + 1, seen_count = seen_count + 1, " .. "room = excluded.room, updated_at = excluded.updated_at;", Util.fixsql(mob_name), Util.fixsql(room_name), roomid, Util.fixsql(zone), os.time() )) end
--- Record a mob kill (increment kill_count for matching mob+zone) -- @param mob_name mob display name -- @param zone area short key -- Side effects: DB UPDATE mobs SET kill_count = kill_count + 1 -- Tested by: DB.record_kill function DB.record_kill(mob_name, zone) DB.execute(string.format( "UPDATE mobs SET kill_count = kill_count + 1 WHERE mob = %s AND zone = %s;", Util.fixsql(mob_name), Util.fixsql(zone) )) end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- State: Central state container ------------------------------------------------------------------------ State = { _room = {rmid = -1, arid = "", name = "", exits = {}, maze = false}, _prev_room = {rmid = -2, arid = ""}, _target = nil, -- {keyword, name, room_name, area, index, activity} _activity = "none", -- "cp", "gq", "quest", "none" _char_state = "0", _noexp = false, _level = 0, _tier = 0, _tnl = 0, _dirty = false, }
function State.get_room() return State._room end
function State.get_target() return State._target end
function State.get_activity() return State._activity end
--- Set current activity and broadcast (no-op if same value) -- @param act "cp", "gq", "quest", or "none" -- Side effects: sets _dirty, broadcasts BCAST_ACTIVITY -- Tested by: State.set_activity, State.set_activity_same, State.activity_transitions function State.set_activity(act) if State._activity ~= act then State._activity = act State._dirty = true State.broadcast_activity() end end
--- Set current target and broadcast change (or clear if nil) -- @param target target table {mob, keyword, area_key, ...} or nil to clear -- Side effects: _dirty, broadcasts BCAST_TARGET_CHANGED or BCAST_TARGET_CLEARED -- Tested by: State.set_target, State.clear_target function State.set_target(target) State._target = target State._dirty = true if target then State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_TARGET_CHANGED, json.encode(target)) else State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_TARGET_CLEARED, "") end end
function State.clear_target() State.set_target(nil) end
--- Update room state from GMCP room.info data -- @param ri GMCP room.info table {num, zone, name, exits, details} -- Side effects: saves _prev_room, updates _room -- Tested by: State.update_room, State.update_room_maze, State.update_room_prev, State.update_room_nil_fields function State.update_room(ri) State._prev_room = State._room State._room = { rmid = ri.num or -1, arid = ri.zone or "", name = ri.name or "", exits = ri.exits or {}, maze = (ri.details and string.match(ri.details, "maze")) and true or false, } end
--- Update character state from GMCP char.status data -- @param status GMCP char.status table {state, level, tnl} (nil safe) -- Side effects: updates _char_state, _level, _tnl -- Tested by: State.update_char, State.update_char_nil function State.update_char(status) if status then State._char_state = status.state or "0" State._level = tonumber(status.level) or 0 State._tnl = tonumber(status.tnl) or 0 end end
function State.broadcast(msg_num, data) BroadcastPlugin(msg_num, data or "") end
function State.broadcast_activity() State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_ACTIVITY, State._activity) end
function State.broadcast_full() local snapshot = { room = State._room, target = State._target, activity = State._activity, noexp = State._noexp, level = State._level, } State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_FULL_STATE, json.encode(snapshot)) end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- MobKeyword: Guess mob keywords for targeting ------------------------------------------------------------------------ MobKeyword = {}
--- Guess a keyword for targeting a mob (6-stage algorithm) -- Stages: 1) DB override, 2) CONST exceptions, 3) clean punctuation, -- 4) strip articles, 5) area filters, 6) first5+last5 or 70% truncation -- @param mob_name full mob display name (e.g., "a sinister vandal") -- @param area area short key (e.g., "diatz") -- @return keyword string (never nil, empty string for nil/empty input) -- Tested by: MobKeyword.guess_basic, _punctuation, _empty, _exceptions_hardcoded, -- _area_filters, _sohtwo_filters, _hyphens, _all_articles, _area_filter_to_single, -- _quotation_marks, _parentheses, _long_mob_name function MobKeyword.guess(mob_name, area) if not mob_name or mob_name == "" then return "" end
area = area or (State._room and State._room.arid) or ""
-- Stage 1: Check DB overrides local override = DB.get_mob_override(mob_name, area) if override and override.keyword and override.keyword ~= "" then Util.debug("Found override keyword for '", mob_name, "': ", override.keyword) return override.keyword end
-- Stage 1b: Check hardcoded exceptions local area_exceptions = CONST.MOB_KEYWORD_EXCEPTIONS[area] if area_exceptions and area_exceptions[mob_name] then return area_exceptions[mob_name] end
-- Stage 2: Clean the mob name local words = {} for w in string.gmatch(string.lower(mob_name), "[^ ]+") do w = w:gsub("'s$", "") -- possessives (before other punctuation) w = w:gsub("[,%.!?\"()]+", "") -- common punctuation if w ~= "" then words[#words + 1] = w end end
-- Stage 3: Remove omit words (articles, prepositions) local cleaned = {} for _, w in ipairs(words) do if not CONST.OMIT_WORDS[w] then cleaned[#cleaned + 1] = w end end
if #cleaned == 0 then return mob_name -- fallback to original if everything was filtered end
local joined = table.concat(cleaned, " ")
-- Stage 4: Apply area-specific filters local filtered = joined local filters = CONST.AREA_KEYWORD_FILTERS[area] if filters then for _, v in ipairs(filters) do local result = string.gsub(joined, v.f, v.g) if result ~= joined then filtered = result break end end end filtered = filtered:gsub("%-", " ")
-- Stage 5: Build keyword from first and last words local parts = {} for w in string.gmatch(filtered, "[^ ]+") do parts[#parts + 1] = w end
if #parts == 0 then return mob_name end
local guess if #parts > 1 then -- Multi-word: first 4-5 chars of first + first 4-5 chars of last local x = math.min(5, #parts[1]) local y = math.min(5, #parts[#parts]) guess = parts[1]:sub(1, x) .. " " .. parts[#parts]:sub(1, y) else -- Single word: use most of it local len = #parts[1] local x = math.max(3, math.floor(len * 0.7)) guess = parts[1]:sub(1, x) end
return guess end
--- Get mob override info (keyword, nohunt, etc.) function MobKeyword.get_override(mob_name, area) return DB.get_mob_override(mob_name, area) end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- CP: Campaign management (stub - Phase 2) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ CP = { _info_list = {}, _check_list = {}, _on_cp = false, _level = 0, _type = "area", -- "area" or "room" (default area if cp info times out) _can_get_new = false, _last_check_time = 0, -- cooldown: os.clock() of last cp check _last_target = nil, -- backup for target matching after refresh }
--- Start a new campaign (triggered by "Good luck in your campaign!") -- Side effects: sets _on_cp, activity="cp", turns noexp OFF, persists level, sends "cp info" -- Guard: no-op if already on CP (prevents double-call) -- Tested by: CP.start, CP.start_double_call_guard, CP.start_noexp_already_off, -- workflow.cp_request_starts_flow, workflow.cp_request_turns_noexp_off function CP.start() if CP._on_cp then return end -- guard: prevent double-call from rapid triggers CP._on_cp = true CP._can_get_new = false CP._level = State._level SetVariable("snd_cp_level", tostring(CP._level)) State.set_activity("cp")
-- Turn noexp off â player needs XP for CP mobs if Noexp._noexp_on then Noexp.set(false) Util.info("Turning noexp ", "OFF", " (campaign started)") end
CP.do_info() end
--- Send "cp info" and enable level+start triggers (line+end deferred to on_cp_info_start) -- Side effects: clears _info_list, enables trg_cp_info_level + trg_cp_info_start only, -- starts safety timer, sends "cp info" -- Tested by: CP.do_info.enables_triggers_and_sends, workflow.xcp_picks_up_existing_cp function CP.do_info() CP._info_list = {} -- Only enable level + start triggers; line + end enabled by on_cp_info_start -- (prevents end trigger from firing on header lines before targets appear) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_level", true) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_start", true) EnableTimer("tim_parse_safety", true) ResetTimer("tim_parse_safety") SendNoEcho("cp info") end
--- Send "cp check" and enable check_line trigger (check_end deferred to first line match) -- Side effects: clears _check_list, enables trg_cp_check_line only, -- starts safety timer, sends "cp check" -- Tested by: CP.do_check.sends_when_ready, CP.do_check.cooldown_guard function CP.do_check() local now = os.clock() if (now - CP._last_check_time) < 1.0 then Util.debug("CP.do_check skipped (cooldown)") return end CP._last_check_time = now CP._check_list = {} -- Only enable check_line; check_end enabled by first on_cp_check_line -- (prevents end trigger from firing on pre-check output) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_check_line", true) EnableTimer("tim_parse_safety", true) ResetTimer("tim_parse_safety") SendNoEcho("cp check") end
--- Clear all CP state (campaign completed, cleared, or not on CP) -- Side effects: resets CP fields, clears TargetList + State target + activity -- TODO Phase 5: preserve GQ state when CP clears -- Tested by: CP.clear, workflow.cp_complete_clears_everything function CP.clear() CP._on_cp = false CP._level = 0 SetVariable("snd_cp_level", "0") CP._type = "area" CP._can_get_new = false CP._info_list = {} CP._check_list = {} CP._last_target = nil
-- TODO Phase 5: Check if GQ is active before clearing target list/activity. -- WinkleGold preserves GQ state when CP clears. For now, clear everything. TargetList.clear() State.clear_target() State.set_activity("none") end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- GQ: Global quest management (stub - Phase 5) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ GQ = { _info_list = {}, _check_list = {}, _on_gq = false, _joined_id = -1, _started_id = -1, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Quest: Quest management (stub - Phase 4) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Quest = { _target = nil, _next_quest_time = nil, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- TargetList: Build unified target lists from CP/GQ output ------------------------------------------------------------------------ TargetList = { _main_list = {}, _type = "none", -- "area", "room", "none" }
--- Determine if CP is area-based or room-based by checking locations -- against mapper DB + CONST.AREA_NAME_XREF. Majority voting: area>=room â "area". -- @param info_list table of {mob, location} from cp info parsing -- @return "area", "room", or "none" (empty list) -- Tested by: TargetList.detect_type_area, _room, _majority_area, _empty function TargetList.detect_type(info_list) if #info_list == 0 then return "none" end local area_count = 0 local room_count = 0 for _, entry in ipairs(info_list) do if TargetList.resolve_area_key(entry.location) then area_count = area_count + 1 else room_count = room_count + 1 end end if area_count >= room_count then return "area" else return "room" end end
--- Resolve an area long name to an area key (mapper DB first, CONST fallback) -- @param location area long name (e.g., "The Three Pillars of Diatz") -- @return area key string (e.g., "diatz") or nil if unknown -- Tested by: TargetList.resolve_area_key_nil, _known, TargetList.build_area_resolves_area_key --- Resolve area long name to area key via AREA_NAME_XREF lookup -- @param location area long name (e.g. "The Three Pillars of Diatz") -- @return area key string (e.g. "diatz") or nil if unknown -- Note: Does NOT query mapper DB (map_find_query is a display function, not a data API). -- XREF covers ~260 standard Aardwolf areas. Add missing areas to CONST.AREA_NAME_XREF. -- Tested by: TargetList.resolve_area_key_nil, TargetList.resolve_area_key_known function TargetList.resolve_area_key(location) if not location or location == "" then return nil end return CONST.AREA_NAME_XREF[location] end
--- Build the target list from cp check data (keywords, room lookup, sort) -- @param check_list table of {mob, location, dead} from cp check parsing -- @param cp_type "area" or "room" -- @param cp_level level when CP was taken (for room-based level filtering) -- Side effects: populates _main_list, broadcasts BCAST_TARGET_LIST -- Tested by: TargetList.build_area_basic, _resolves_area_key, _unknown_location, -- _keyword_generation, _mob_db_lookup, _mob_db_miss, _sorts_alive_first, -- _dead_flag_from_check, _room_basic function TargetList.build(check_list, cp_type, cp_level) TargetList._main_list = {} TargetList._type = cp_type
for i, entry in ipairs(check_list) do local area_key = TargetList.resolve_area_key(entry.location) local link_type = area_key and cp_type or "unknown"
-- Generate keyword local keyword = "" if area_key then keyword = MobKeyword.guess(entry.mob, area_key) else keyword = MobKeyword.guess(entry.mob, "") end
-- Look up mob history in our database local rooms = {} local found_in_area = false if area_key then local db_results = DB.find_mob(entry.mob, area_key) if db_results and #db_results > 0 then found_in_area = true for _, row in ipairs(db_results) do rooms[#rooms + 1] = { roomid = row.roomid, room_name = row.room, freq = row.freq, } end end end
local target = { mob = entry.mob, location = entry.location, area_key = area_key, keyword = keyword, dead = entry.dead or false, link_type = link_type, roomid = nil, -- populated for room-based CPs room_name = nil, -- populated for room-based CPs rooms = rooms, found_in_area = found_in_area, unlikely = false, likely = false, min_level = nil, max_level = nil, index = 0, -- set after sorting }
target._input_order = i -- track original order for stable sort TargetList._main_list[#TargetList._main_list + 1] = target end
-- Sort: alive first, then dead; within same status, preserve input order table.sort(TargetList._main_list, function(a, b) if a.dead ~= b.dead then return not a.dead -- alive (false) before dead (true) end return a._input_order < b._input_order end)
-- Assign indices after sorting for i, t in ipairs(TargetList._main_list) do t.index = i end
-- Broadcast target list to GUI State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_TARGET_LIST, json.encode(TargetList._main_list)) end
--- Get target by index function TargetList.get(index) return TargetList._main_list[index] end
--- Get total target count function TargetList.count() return #TargetList._main_list end
--- Get list of alive targets only function TargetList.get_alive() local alive = {} for _, t in ipairs(TargetList._main_list) do if not t.dead then alive[#alive + 1] = t end end return alive end
--- Find target by mob name (first match) function TargetList.find_by_mob(mob_name) for _, t in ipairs(TargetList._main_list) do if t.mob == mob_name then return t end end return nil end
--- Mark a target as dead by mob name function TargetList.update_dead(mob_name) for _, t in ipairs(TargetList._main_list) do if t.mob == mob_name then t.dead = true return end end end
--- Display the target list to the user (adapted from Crowley's print_target_links) function TargetList.display() if #TargetList._main_list == 0 then Util.info("No targets to show.") return end local current_target = State.get_target() ColourNote("#808080", "", string.rep("-", 80)) for i, t in ipairs(TargetList._main_list) do local prefix = " " if current_target and current_target.mob == t.mob then prefix = "> " end local dead_tag = t.dead and "[D] " or "" local mob_text = Util.ellipsify(dead_tag .. t.mob, 32) local area = t.area_key and t.area_key:sub(1, 10) or "unknown" local kw_text = t.keyword and (" [" .. t.keyword .. "]") or "" -- Color: dead=gray, current=green, alive=white local color if t.dead then color = "#808080" elseif current_target and current_target.mob == t.mob then color = "#00FF00" elseif t.link_type == "unknown" then color = "#FF6600" else color = "#E0E0E0" end local line = string.format("%s%2d %-32s - %-10s%s", prefix, i, mob_text, area, kw_text) ColourNote(color, "", line) end ColourNote("#808080", "", string.rep("-", 80)) ColourNote("#808080", "", "Type 'xcp <N>' to select a target.") end
--- Clear the target list function TargetList.clear() TargetList._main_list = {} TargetList._type = "none" end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Nav: Navigation â speedwalk, room cycling, arrival detection ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Nav = { _goto_list = {}, -- room IDs for room-based navigation _goto_index = 0, -- current position in goto_list _dest_area = nil, -- target area key (for area arrival detection) _dest_room = nil, -- target room ID (for room arrival detection) _on_arrive = nil, -- callback function on arrival }
--- Vidblain portal room ID local VIDBLAIN_PORTAL_ROOM = 11910
--- Check if an area is a Vidblain area local function is_vidblain_area(area_key) for _, v in ipairs(CONST.VIDBLAIN_AREAS) do if v == area_key then return true end end return false end
--- Send mapper speedwalk command function Nav.mapper_goto(roomid) Execute("mapper goto " .. tostring(roomid)) end
--- Fuzzy match an area key against DEFAULT_START_ROOMS (prefix then substring) -- @param input user-typed area name or partial key -- @return matched area_key or nil. Handles ft2âftii hack. -- Tested by: Nav.fuzzy_match_area_exact, _partial, _ft2_hack, _no_match function Nav.fuzzy_match_area(input) if not input or input == "" then return nil end local arid = string.lower(input)
-- ft2âftii hack (Faerie Tales II) if arid == "ft2" then arid = "ftii" end
-- Exact match first if CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS[arid] then return arid end
-- Partial match: area key starts with input for key, _ in pairs(CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS) do if string.sub(key, 1, #arid) == arid then return key end end
-- Partial match: area key contains input anywhere for key, _ in pairs(CONST.DEFAULT_START_ROOMS) do if string.find(key, arid, 1, true) then return key end end
return nil end
--- Navigate to an area's start room (with Vidblain portal handling) -- @param area_key area short key (e.g., "diatz") -- Side effects: sets _dest_area, calls mapper goto, handles Vidblain portal -- Tested by: Nav.goto_area_basic, _sets_dest, _unknown, _ft2_hack, _vidblain, _vidblain_already_in function Nav.goto_area(area_key) if not area_key or area_key == "" then return end
-- ft2âftii hack if area_key == "ft2" then area_key = "ftii" end
-- Look up start room local roomid = DB.get_start_room(area_key) if not roomid then Util.error("No start room defined for area: ", area_key) return end
Nav._dest_area = area_key Nav._dest_room = nil
-- Vidblain special case if is_vidblain_area(area_key) then local current_area = State._room and State._room.arid or "" if not is_vidblain_area(current_area) then -- Not in Vidblain â go to portal first, then walk to destination Util.info("Navigating to Vidblain portal...") Nav.mapper_goto(VIDBLAIN_PORTAL_ROOM) Execute("enter hole") -- Store actual destination for deferred navigation after arrival in vidblain Nav._vidblain_dest = roomid return end end
Nav.mapper_goto(roomid) end
--- Navigate to a specific room ID function Nav.goto_room(roomid) if not roomid then return end Nav._dest_room = roomid Nav._dest_area = nil Nav.mapper_goto(roomid) end
--- Advance to next room in goto_list function Nav.goto_next() if #Nav._goto_list == 0 then return end if Nav._goto_index >= #Nav._goto_list then return end
Nav._goto_index = Nav._goto_index + 1 local roomid = Nav._goto_list[Nav._goto_index] Nav._dest_room = roomid Nav.mapper_goto(roomid) end
--- Called from OnPluginBroadcast on room.info â detect arrival at destination -- @param ri GMCP room.info table {num, zone, name} -- Side effects: fires _on_arrive callback if dest matched, handles Vidblain deferred nav -- Tested by: Nav.on_room_change_area_arrival, _area_not_arrived, _room_arrival, _no_dest function Nav.on_room_change(ri) if not ri then return end local room_num = ri.num local room_area = ri.zone if not room_num or not room_area then return end
-- Room-level arrival if Nav._dest_room and room_num == Nav._dest_room then Nav._dest_room = nil if Nav._on_arrive then Nav._on_arrive() Nav._on_arrive = nil end return end
-- Area-level arrival if Nav._dest_area and room_area == Nav._dest_area then Nav._dest_area = nil -- If we had a deferred Vidblain destination, navigate there now if Nav._vidblain_dest then Nav.mapper_goto(Nav._vidblain_dest) Nav._vidblain_dest = nil return end if Nav._on_arrive then Nav._on_arrive() Nav._on_arrive = nil end return end
-- Vidblain transit: check if we arrived in vidblain continent if Nav._vidblain_dest and room_area == "vidblain" then Util.info("Arrived in Vidblain, navigating to destination...") Nav.mapper_goto(Nav._vidblain_dest) Nav._vidblain_dest = nil end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- HuntTrick: Progressive hunt cycling (stub - Phase 3) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ HuntTrick = { _index = 1, _keyword = "", _active = false, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- AutoHunt: Auto-hunt with direction following (stub - Phase 3) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ AutoHunt = { _mob = "", _direction = "", _active = false, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- QuickWhere: Quick where iteration (stub - Phase 3) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ QuickWhere = { _index = 1, _exact = false, _active = false, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- SmartScan: Scan + consider (stub - Phase 4) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ SmartScan = { _scanned_mobs = {}, _considered_mobs = {}, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Noexp: Auto-noexp management ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Noexp = { _tnl_cutoff = 0, _noexp_on = false, _auto_enabled = true, }
--- Initialize noexp from Config settings (auto on/off, TNL cutoff) -- Side effects: reads Config, sets _tnl_cutoff and _auto_enabled -- Tested by: Noexp.init_defaults, Noexp.init_custom function Noexp.init() Noexp._tnl_cutoff = tonumber(Config.get("noexp_tnl_cutoff")) or 0 Noexp._auto_enabled = Config.get("noexp_auto") == "on" end
--- Auto-toggle noexp based on TNL vs cutoff (guards: auto, level>=200, CP active, nil TNL) -- Side effects: calls Noexp.set(true/false) which sends "noexp" game command -- Tested by: Noexp.check_tnl_turns_on/off, _disabled, _cutoff_zero, _no_change_on/off, -- _level_200/201, _exact_cutoff_off/on, _skips_during_cp, _activates_without_cp function Noexp.check_tnl() if not Noexp._auto_enabled then return end if State._level >= 200 then if Noexp._noexp_on then Noexp.set(false) Util.info("Turning noexp ", "OFF", " (level 200+)") end return end
local tnl = State._tnl if not tnl then return end if Noexp._tnl_cutoff <= 0 then return end
if tnl < Noexp._tnl_cutoff and not Noexp._noexp_on and not CP._on_cp then Noexp.set(true) Util.info("Turning noexp ", "ON", " (TNL ", tostring(tnl), " < cutoff ", tostring(Noexp._tnl_cutoff), ")") elseif tnl > Noexp._tnl_cutoff and Noexp._noexp_on then Noexp.set(false) Util.info("Turning noexp ", "OFF", " (TNL ", tostring(tnl), " > cutoff ", tostring(Noexp._tnl_cutoff), ")") end end
--- Toggle noexp on/off (no-op if already in desired state) -- @param on boolean: true = noexp on, false = noexp off -- Side effects: SendNoEcho("noexp"), updates State._noexp, broadcasts BCAST_NOEXP -- Tested by: Noexp.set_no_change, Noexp.set_broadcasts function Noexp.set(on) -- Only send command if state actually needs to change if Noexp._noexp_on == on then return end Noexp._noexp_on = on State._noexp = on SendNoEcho("noexp") -- toggle via game command (Aardwolf checks current state) State.broadcast(CONST.BCAST_NOEXP, json.encode({noexp = on, tnl_cutoff = Noexp._tnl_cutoff})) end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- DamageTracker: Track damage/kills (stub - Phase 2) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ DamageTracker = { _last_damaged = nil, _last_killed = nil, }
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Plugin Lifecycle ------------------------------------------------------------------------
function OnPluginInstall() ColourNote("#808080", "", "\n+=================================================================+") ColourNote("#FF5000", "", " Search & Destroy v" .. GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) .. " installed") ColourNote("#FF5000", "", " Type 'xhelp' for commands") ColourNote("#808080", "", "+=================================================================+\n") end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id == CONST.GMCP_HANDLER then if text == "char.status" then local status = Util.gmcp("char.status") if status then State.update_char(status) Noexp.check_tnl() end elseif text == "room.info" then local ri = Util.gmcp("room.info") if ri then State.update_room(ri) Nav.on_room_change(ri) end elseif text == "comm.quest" then local q = Util.gmcp("comm.quest") if q then Quest.on_gmcp(q) end elseif text == "config" then local noexp_val = Util.gmcp("config.noexp") if noexp_val then Noexp._noexp_on = (noexp_val == "YES") State._noexp = Noexp._noexp_on end end end end
function Quest.on_gmcp(q) -- Stub: will be implemented in Phase 4 Util.debug("Quest GMCP: ", q.action or "unknown") end
function OnPluginSaveState() Config.save() end
function OnPluginClose() OnPluginSaveState() DB.close() end
function OnPluginEnable() Util.info("Search and Destroy ", "enabled") end
function OnPluginDisable() Util.info("Search and Destroy ", "disabled") end
--- Delayed init timer callback function on_init_timer() if not IsConnected() then -- Re-enable timer to try again EnableTimer("tim_init", true) return end
Config.load() DB.init() Noexp.init()
-- Restore persisted CP level (for reconnect recovery) local saved_cp_level = GetVariable("snd_cp_level") if saved_cp_level then CP._level = tonumber(saved_cp_level) or 0 end
-- Request tags for scan SendNoEcho("tags scan on") SendNoEcho("tags roomchars on")
Util.debug("Plugin initialized") end
--- Parse safety timeout function on_parse_safety_timeout() -- Disable all parsing trigger groups EnableTriggerGroup("grp_cp_info", false) EnableTriggerGroup("grp_cp_check", false) EnableTriggerGroup("grp_gq_info", false) EnableTriggerGroup("grp_gq_check", false) -- Reset CP parsing state to prevent stuck partial state if CP._on_cp and #CP._check_list == 0 then Util.error("Parse timeout: CP parsing incomplete, resetting") CP._info_list = {} CP._check_list = {} end Util.debug("Parse safety timeout: disabled parsing groups") end
--- State save timer function on_state_save_timer() if Config._dirty then Config.save() SaveState() end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Command Handlers (stubs - detailed implementation in later phases) ------------------------------------------------------------------------
function cmd_xhelp(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("#FF5000", "", "\n=== Search & Destroy v2 Commands ===") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xcp [N] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Select target N from list (or show list)") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " go [area/N] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Navigate to target area or room N") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " nx ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Execute next action on current target") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " ht [N] [mob] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Hunt trick: cycle hunt N.mob") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " qw [mob] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Quick where: locate mob") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " qs ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Quick scan: scan + consider") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " ah [mob] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Auto-hunt: follow hunt directions") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " kk ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Quick kill current target") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xrt [keyword] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Re-target with new keyword") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xset [setting] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- View/change settings") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xtest [cmd] ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Testing/debug commands") Note("") end
function cmd_xset(name, line, wildcards) local args = Util.trim(wildcards[1] or "") if args == "" then -- Show all settings ColourNote("#FF5000", "", "\n=== Search & Destroy Settings ===") for key, default in pairs(Config._defaults) do local val = Config.get(key) local color = (val == default) and "#E0E0E0" or "#00FF00" ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", string.format(" %-20s", key), color, "", val) end Note("") return end -- Special: xset kw <keyword> â override keyword for current target local kw_arg = args:match("^kw%s+(.+)$") if kw_arg then local target = State.get_target() if not target then Util.error("No target set. Use xcp to select a target first.") return end local keyword = Util.trim(kw_arg) -- Update current target target.keyword = keyword -- Update target list entry local list_entry = TargetList.find_by_mob(target.mob) if list_entry then list_entry.keyword = keyword end -- Save to DB mob_overrides for future use if target.area_key then DB.execute(string.format( "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO mob_overrides (mob_name, area_id, keyword) VALUES (%s, %s, %s);", Util.fixsql(target.mob), Util.fixsql(target.area_key), Util.fixsql(keyword) )) end Util.info("Keyword for '", target.mob, "' set to '", keyword, "'") return end if args == "kw" then local target = State.get_target() if target then Util.info("Current keyword: '", target.keyword, "' for '", target.mob, "'") else Util.error("No target set.") end return end
-- Parse "key value" or "key" local key, value = args:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") if not key then key = args -- Show single setting local val = Config.get(key) if val then Util.info(key, " = ", val) else Util.error("Unknown setting: ", key) end return end if Config.set(key, value) then Util.info("Set ", key, " = ", value) -- Special handling for noexp settings if key == "noexp_tnl_cutoff" then Noexp._tnl_cutoff = tonumber(value) or 0 Noexp.check_tnl() elseif key == "noexp_auto" then Noexp._auto_enabled = (value == "on") Noexp.check_tnl() end end end
function cmd_xtest(name, line, wildcards) local args = Util.trim(wildcards[1] or "") if args == "" then ColourNote("#FF5000", "", "\n=== xtest commands ===") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xtest state ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Print current state") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xtest db ", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Verify database") ColourNote("#00B4E0", "", " xtest keyword <mob> [area]", "#E0E0E0", "", "- Test keyword guessing") Note("") return end
local cmd = args:match("^(%S+)") local rest = args:match("^%S+%s+(.+)$") or ""
if cmd == "state" then ColourNote("#FF5000", "", "\n=== S&D State ===") local room = State.get_room() Util.info("Room: ", tostring(room.rmid), " (", room.arid, ") ", room.name) Util.info("Activity: ", State.get_activity()) Util.info("Level: ", tostring(State._level), " TNL: ", tostring(State._tnl)) Util.info("Noexp: ", tostring(State._noexp)) local target = State.get_target() if target then Util.info("Target: ", target.name or "?", " [", target.keyword or "?", "] in ", target.area or "?") else Util.info("Target: ", "none") end Note("")
elseif cmd == "db" then local db = DB.open() if db then Util.info("Database: ", DB.get_path()) Util.info("Schema version: ", tostring(DB.get_version())) local counts = { mobs = DB.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM mobs")[1].c, areas = DB.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM areas")[1].c, overrides = DB.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM mob_overrides")[1].c, start_rooms = DB.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM start_rooms")[1].c, } Util.info("Tables: mobs=", tostring(counts.mobs), " areas=", tostring(counts.areas), " overrides=", tostring(counts.overrides), " start_rooms=", tostring(counts.start_rooms)) else Util.error("Database not available") end
elseif cmd == "keyword" then local mob, area = rest:match("^(.+)%s+(%S+)$") if not mob then mob = rest area = State._room and State._room.arid or "" end if mob == "" then Util.error("Usage: xtest keyword <mob name> [area]") return end local guess = MobKeyword.guess(mob, area) Util.info("Mob: '", mob, "' Area: '", area, "' -> Keyword: '", guess, "'")
else Util.error("Unknown xtest command: ", cmd, ". Type 'xtest' for help.") end end
--- Select CP target by index, display list, or attempt mid-campaign pickup -- @param wildcards[1] optional index N or empty string -- Side effects: if not on CP, calls CP.do_info() to attempt pickup (async); -- if on CP, sets State target, sets Nav._on_arrive callback (based on xcp_action_mode), -- and triggers Nav navigation -- Tested by: cmd_xcp.not_on_cp, cmd_xcp.no_arg_displays_list, -- cmd_xcp.numeric_selects_target, cmd_xcp.index_out_of_bounds, -- cmd_xcp.numeric_skips_dead, cmd_xcp.unknown_rejected, -- workflow.xcp_selects_and_navigates, workflow.xcp_picks_up_existing_cp function cmd_xcp(name, line, wildcards) local args = Util.trim(wildcards[1] or "")
if not CP._on_cp then -- Attempt to pick up an existing campaign (e.g. plugin loaded mid-CP) Util.info("Checking for active campaign...") CP.do_info() return end if TargetList.count() == 0 then Util.error("Campaign active but target list is empty.") return end
if args == "" then -- Display target list (WinkleGold behavior) TargetList.display() return else -- Numeric index selection local index = tonumber(args) if not index then Util.error("Usage: xcp [N] â select target by index") return end if index < 1 or index > TargetList.count() then Util.error("Invalid index: ", tostring(index), " (1-", tostring(TargetList.count()), ")") return end local t = TargetList.get(index) if t.link_type == "unknown" then Util.error("Target #", tostring(index), " has no mapper data.") return end State.set_target(t)
-- Set arrival callback based on xcp_action_mode (Crowley's execute_in_area pattern) local action = Config.get("xcp_action_mode") if action ~= "off" then Nav._on_arrive = function() -- TODO Phase 3: replace with actual hunt trick / quick where local mode_desc = (action == "ht") and "hunt trick" or "quick where" Util.info("Arrived in ", t.area_key, " â use ", mode_desc, " to find ", t.mob) end end
if t.link_type == "area" then Nav.goto_area(t.area_key) elseif t.link_type == "room" and t.roomid then Nav.goto_room(t.roomid) elseif t.area_key then Nav.goto_area(t.area_key) end end end
function cmd_go(name, line, wildcards) local args = Util.trim(wildcards[1] or "") local index = tonumber(args) if not index or index < 1 then index = 1 end
if #Nav._goto_list == 0 then Util.error("No room list. Use xcp to select a target first.") return end
local entry = Nav._goto_list[index] if not entry then Util.error("No room at index ", tostring(index)) return end
Nav._goto_index = index if type(entry) == "string" then -- Area ID â navigate to area start room Nav.goto_area(entry) else -- Room ID â direct navigation Nav.goto_room(entry) end end
function cmd_nx(name, line, wildcards) if #Nav._goto_list == 0 then Util.error("No room list. Use xcp to select a target first.") return end
-- Only advance if we're at the current indexed room local current = Nav._goto_list[Nav._goto_index] if current and State._room and tonumber(current) == State._room.rmid then Nav._goto_index = Nav._goto_index + 1 end
local next_entry = Nav._goto_list[Nav._goto_index] if not next_entry then Util.info("No more rooms in list.") return end
Nav._dest_room = next_entry Nav.mapper_goto(next_entry) end
function cmd_ht(name, line, wildcards) Util.info("ht: Not yet implemented (Phase 3)") end
function cmd_qw(name, line, wildcards) Util.info("qw: Not yet implemented (Phase 3)") end
function cmd_qs(name, line, wildcards) Util.info("qs: Not yet implemented (Phase 4)") end
function cmd_ah(name, line, wildcards) Util.info("ah: Not yet implemented (Phase 3)") end
function cmd_xrt(name, line, wildcards) local args = Util.trim(wildcards[1] or "") if args == "" then Util.error("Usage: xrt <area> â speedwalk to area start room") return end local area_key = Nav.fuzzy_match_area(args) if not area_key then Util.error("Unknown area: ", args) return end Nav.goto_area(area_key) end
function cmd_kk(name, line, wildcards) local kk_cmd = Config.get("quick_kill_command") or "k" local target = State.get_target() if target and target.keyword then SendNoEcho(kk_cmd .. " " .. target.keyword) else Util.error("No target set. Use xcp to select a target first.") end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Trigger Callbacks (stubs - detailed implementation in later phases) ------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- CP INFO triggers function on_cp_info_level(name, line, wildcards) CP._level = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 0 Util.debug("CP level: ", tostring(CP._level)) end
--- Callback: "The targets for this campaign are:" â enable line+end triggers -- Side effects: clears _info_list, enables trg_cp_info_line + trg_cp_info_end, -- disables trg_cp_info_start (Crowley's pattern: stage triggers to prevent premature end) -- Tested by: CP.do_info.start_enables_line_and_end, CP.info_parse_flow function on_cp_info_start(name, line, wildcards) CP._info_list = {} EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_start", false) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_line", true) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_end", true) end
function on_cp_info_line(name, line, wildcards) CP._info_list[#CP._info_list + 1] = { mob = wildcards[1], location = wildcards[2], } end
--- Callback: cp info parsing complete â set CP active, detect type, chain to cp check -- Side effects: disables all grp_cp_info triggers individually, sets CP._on_cp = true -- + activity = "cp", detects area/room type, schedules CP.do_check() via 0.1s DoAfterSpecial -- Tested by: CP.info_parse_flow (callbacks only), CP.info_end_sets_cp_state, -- workflow.cp_info_to_check_chain, workflow.xcp_picks_up_existing_cp function on_cp_info_end(name, line, wildcards) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_level", false) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_start", false) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_line", false) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_info_end", false) EnableTimer("tim_parse_safety", false)
-- Mark as on-CP (handles mid-campaign plugin load/reconnect) CP._on_cp = true State.set_activity("cp")
-- Detect area vs room type from info list CP._type = TargetList.detect_type(CP._info_list) Util.debug("CP type: ", CP._type, " (", tostring(#CP._info_list), " targets)")
-- Chain to cp check after short delay (allows MUD output to settle) DoAfterSpecial(0.1, "CP.do_check()", sendto.script) end
-- CP CHECK triggers --- Callback: each "You still have to kill *" line â enable end trigger on first match -- Side effects: appends to CP._check_list, enables trg_cp_check_end on first line -- Tested by: CP.check_parse_flow function on_cp_check_line(name, line, wildcards) -- Enable end trigger on first line match (prevents premature firing) if #CP._check_list == 0 then EnableTrigger("trg_cp_check_end", true) end local dead = (wildcards[3] == "Dead") or false CP._check_list[#CP._check_list + 1] = { mob = wildcards[1], location = wildcards[2], dead = dead, } end
--- Callback: cp check parsing complete â build target list -- Side effects: disables check triggers individually, sets CP active, builds TargetList -- Tested by: CP.check_parse_flow, workflow.cp_check_builds_target_list function on_cp_check_end(name, line, wildcards) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_check_line", false) EnableTrigger("trg_cp_check_end", false) EnableTimer("tim_parse_safety", false)
-- CP._on_cp and State._activity are already set by CP.start(). -- Re-confirm here defensively (handles reconnect case where cp check -- is sent without cp info, e.g., after plugin reload mid-campaign). CP._on_cp = true State.set_activity("cp")
-- Guard: empty check list means parse failed if #CP._check_list == 0 then Util.error("CP check parse failed (no targets received)") return end
-- Build target list from check data TargetList.build(CP._check_list, CP._type, CP._level)
-- Always re-match current target against new list -- (handles: mob killed refresh, manual refresh, other player killed a mob) local prev_target = CP._last_target or State.get_target() CP._last_target = nil if prev_target then local found = TargetList.find_by_mob(prev_target.mob) if found and not found.dead then -- Prior target is still alive â keep it State.set_target(found) else -- Prior target is dead or gone â auto-select next alive target local alive = TargetList.get_alive() if #alive > 0 then State.set_target(alive[1]) else State.clear_target() end end end end
-- CP EVENT triggers function on_cp_request(name, line, wildcards) CP.start() end
function on_cp_mob_killed(name, line, wildcards) if State.get_activity() ~= "cp" then return end
-- Save current target for re-matching after refresh CP._last_target = State.get_target()
Util.info("Campaign mob killed!")
-- Refresh target list after short delay DoAfterSpecial(0.1, "CP.do_check()", sendto.script) end
function on_cp_complete(name, line, wildcards) Util.important("Campaign complete!") CP.clear() end
function on_cp_cleared(name, line, wildcards) Util.info("Campaign cleared.") CP.clear() end
function on_cp_new_available(name, line, wildcards) CP._can_get_new = true Util.debug("New campaign available") end
function on_cp_not_on(name, line, wildcards) if CP._on_cp then CP.clear() end end
function on_cp_must_level(name, line, wildcards) CP._can_get_new = false -- Turn noexp off â player needs to level (TODO: test live at appropriate level) if Noexp._noexp_on then Noexp.set(false) Util.info("Turning noexp ", "OFF", " (must level for new campaign)") end end
function on_cp_timer(name, line, wildcards) -- Superhero CP cooldown (TODO: verify live at superhero level) CP._can_get_new = false end
-- GQ INFO triggers function on_gq_info_quest_name(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_info_extended(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_info_level(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_info_line(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_info_end(name, line, wildcards) end
-- GQ CHECK triggers function on_gq_check_line(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_check_end(name, line, wildcards) end
-- GQ EVENT triggers function on_gq_mob_killed(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_joined(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_started(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_finished(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_ended(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_not_started(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_won(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_cancelled(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_quit(name, line, wildcards) end function on_gq_not_in(name, line, wildcards) end
-- HUNT TRICK triggers function on_ht_direction(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ht_here(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ht_unable(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ht_not_found(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ht_abort(name, line, wildcards) end
-- AUTO HUNT triggers function on_ah_direction(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ah_here(name, line, wildcards) end function on_ah_not_found(name, line, wildcards) end
-- QUICK WHERE triggers function on_qw_match(name, line, wildcards) end function on_qw_no_match(name, line, wildcards) end
-- KILL DETECT triggers function on_kill_detect_xp(name, line, wildcards) end
-- NOEXP triggers function on_noexp_level(name, line, wildcards) end function on_noexp_powerup(name, line, wildcards) end
